calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Rowena Soriano mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
Consent from other parent on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Rainna Norde to Raina Soriano.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Kanako Ito aka Kanako Ito Kaufman aka Kanako Kaufman present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Kanako Ito Kaufman.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Off Calendar

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Denied
